labels: healthy sorghum panicle with clean grain, no visible mold or discoloration
sorghum panicle with slight grain mold, small patches of fuzzy mold on 1-10% of grains
sorghum panicle with moderate grain mold, visible mold growth on 11-25% of grains
sorghum panicle with heavy grain mold, extensive fuzzy mold covering 26-50% of grains, discoloration
